description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a ring of evenly spaced, small ornamental trees on a grassy plot. The building features a flat roof with multiple levels and open terraces, and its exterior is finished in a combination of light gray and white materials, likely concrete and plaster. Large windows and sliding glass doors are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The layout includes a central courtyard or open area, visible from above, and several outdoor patios or decks. The landscaping is minimalistic, with no visible fencing or driveways, emphasizing the open, contemporary design. The overall structure is rectangular with clean, straight lines and a focus on functional outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, open terraces, and surrounded by ornamental trees on a grassy plot. The design is minimalistic and emphasizes outdoor living with multiple patios and a central courtyard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and a central open area, with ornamental trees in the foreground.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back patio, additional windows, and the continuation of the tree ring around the property.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the flat roof's multi-level design, side patios, and the arrangement of trees along the side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible terraces, side windows, and the open grassy area bordered by trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
